'''Trevalis''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Kallistas]] during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was the headquarters of [[Imperial Prefect|Prefect]] [[Dengless Rinn]], with 220 inhabitants including some 24 militia. It was also the only official [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Two for the Price of One|book=Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
